ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of the issue (e.g., Defect, Task) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., New, Accepted) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "milestone" TEXT /* Milestone associated with the issue, if any */,
  "owner" TEXT /* User responsible for the issue */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary or description of the issue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was last updated */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* User who reported the issue */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_summary" TEXT /* Summary of how the issue was resolved */,
  "version_affected" TEXT /* Version of the software affected by the issue */,
  "linked_code_commit" TEXT /* Git commit hash or link to the code change that resolved the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_priority FOREIGN KEY ("priority") REFERENCES issue_priorities ("priority_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_issue_type FOREIGN KEY ("issue_type") REFERENCES issue_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_owner FOREIGN KEY ("owner") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_milestone FOREIGN KEY ("milestone") REFERENCES milestones ("milestone_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., Developer, QA, Project Manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the company */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the milestone */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the milestone */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label entry */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated issue */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label for categorization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the label was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_labels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_labels_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment pertains to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last updated */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES issue_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change record */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue that has a status change */,
  "old_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the issue */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the issue */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User who changed the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue type (e.g., Defect, Task) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the issue type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the issue type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_types_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the priority level */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_priorities_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_priorities_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
